results.rendered_html:
yūthya (von yūtha) adj. gaṇa digādi zu  P. 4,3,54  (yūthya nach 6,1,213 ). zur Heerde gehörig: vṛṣan  ṚV. 9,15,4 . aśvānāminna yūthyām  VĀLAKH. 8,4 . so cinnu vṛṣṭiryūthyā3svā sacā  ṚV. 10,23,4 . yūthya am Ende eines comp. zur Schaar —, zur Heerde von — gehörig gaṇa vargyādi zu  P. 6,2,131 . śvayūthyāḥ so v. a. ein Rudel Hunde  MBH. 8,4604 . mṛjāvānsyātsvayūthyeṣu gegen die Seinigen 12,4360 .
— Vgl. sa˚.

results.rendered_html:
yūthya a. [yūtha-yat]
1 Belonging to a troop or herd (at the end of comp.), as in śvayūthyāḥ.
2 Belonging to a herd or flock, being at the head of a herd.
